description: Style Note enamor's range of flirty and pretty nightdresses are quite impressive. Capturing the mood of the season in the colours, fabric and designs, your beauty sleep is is made even more comfortable by this range. Enjoy the obvious cutesy look of this pink nightdress. Product Details Lavender spaghetti chemise, has a V neckline, lace detail on the bust, straps crossover at the back with cut out detail below, frills from below the cut out detail to the hemline and asymmetric hemline Material and Care Fabric: 85% nylon and 15% spandex Trims: 92% nylon and 8% spandex Hand wash Do not bleach Do not iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size L
